boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Defense administration / logistics controls action now? Action: training range reservation outside approved scope. Boundary: training request cannot expand approved activity scope.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Current control record closes exact boundary before execution.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: SRC-827683DC8D76-CTL confirms range reservation, training type, and safety officer approval match is current, exact, and tied to action.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No narrow defect remains; tone is noncontrolling.

final_answer: Allow. The current control record explicitly confirms the range reservation, training type, and safety officer approval are current, exact, and tied to the requested action. The policy permits execution when current source records close the exact requested boundary before execution. Communication tone or sensitivity cannot override source-control records that satisfy the boundary.
